title: Capture, hash and document all validation artifacts for BLE/MeshCore
description: Script or commands to collect all logs, build artifacts, compute SHA256 sums, exit codes from native_posix and 64-bit runs. Ensure clean EBS worktree compliance. Produce summary report.
close_reason: Kconfig NET_ROUTE conflict fixed in native_posix_ble_ingress.conf; validation artifacts report with SHA256 sums, exit codes, clean worktree verification and summary generated and committed. Native_posix and 64-bit BLE/MeshCore runs documented. No subbeads created.
